Title: xAPI GraphQL — Query Push Messages List (Happy Path)
Preconditions: Self-seeds 1 Sent push targeted to ORG_USER (member {{ORG_USER_ID}}) as ADMIN, then reads the recipient inbox via xAPI. Store-user token requires storeId (runner sets it from STORE_ID).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=get_messages] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_messages] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
[DATA label=get_messages] data.pushMessages.items.0.id is non-null
[DATA label=get_messages] data.pushMessages.items.0.shortMessage is non-null
[DATA label=get_messages] data.pushMessages.items.0.isRead is non-null
[DATA label=get_messages] data.pushMessages.items.0.createdDate is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=get_messages] response data matches REST GET /api/push-message/{id} for captured FIRST_MSG_ID
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty, totalCount=0 despite sent messages existing, isRead field absent from response items, HTTP 401 (storeId missing from token request)
Cleanup: none — seed is AGENT-TEST-prefixed and Sent (not deletable)

Title: xAPI GraphQL — Mark Single Push Message as Read
Preconditions: Self-seeds 1 Sent push to ORG_USER then forces it unread (markAllPushMessagesUnread) so an unread message is guaranteed before marking it read.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=force_unread] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=probe_before] errors[] empty
[DATA label=probe_before] data.pushMessages.items.0.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=mark_read] errors[] empty
[DATA label=mark_read] data.markPushMessageRead = true
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.pushMessages.items[?id={{MSG_ID}}].isRead = true
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=read_back] item with MSG_ID shows isRead=true after mutation
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on mark_read, markPushMessageRead returns false, isRead remains false in read_back, HTTP 401

Title: xAPI GraphQL — Mark Single Push Message as Unread
Preconditions: Self-seeds 1 Sent push to ORG_USER then marks all read (markAllPushMessagesRead) so a read message is guaranteed before flipping it back to unread.
Steps:
--- SEED (ADMIN) ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_msg]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-push013", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-push013-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_msg]
--- READ STATE (ORG_USER xAPI) ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP seed_read]
  mutation { markAllPushMessagesRead }
[GQL-EXEC seed_read]
[GQL-OP probe_before]
  query { pushMessages(first: 20, unreadOnly: false) { items { id isRead } } }
[GQL-EXEC probe_before]
[GQL-CAPTURE probe_before.data.pushMessages.items[?isRead=true].id → MSG_ID]
[GQL-OP mark_unread]
  mutation MarkUnread($command: InputMarkPushMessageUnreadType!) {
    markPushMessageUnread(command: $command)
  }
[GQL-VARS mark_unread] {"command": {"messageId": "{{MSG_ID}}"}}
[GQL-EXEC mark_unread]
[GQL-OP read_back]
  query { pushMessages(first: 20, unreadOnly: true) { items { id isRead } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_back]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=seed_read] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=probe_before] errors[] empty
[DATA label=probe_before] data.pushMessages.items[?isRead=true].id is non-null
[ERRORS label=mark_unread] errors[] empty
[DATA label=mark_unread] data.markPushMessageUnread = true
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.pushMessages.items[?id={{MSG_ID}}].isRead = false
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=read_back] unreadOnly=true query now includes MSG_ID
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on mark_unread, markPushMessageUnread returns false, MSG_ID absent from unreadOnly=true list after mutation, HTTP 401

Title: xAPI GraphQL — Mark All Push Messages as Read
Preconditions: Self-seeds 1 Sent push to ORG_USER then forces all unread, marks all read, and verifies unread count drops to 0 while the total list is unchanged (marked, not deleted).
Steps:
--- SEED (ADMIN) ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_msg]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-push014", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-push014-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_msg]
--- READ STATE (ORG_USER xAPI) ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP seed_unread]
  mutation { markAllPushMessagesUnread }
[GQL-EXEC seed_unread]
[GQL-OP probe_before]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: true) { totalCount items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC probe_before]
[GQL-OP mark_all_read]
  mutation { markAllPushMessagesRead }
[GQL-EXEC mark_all_read]
[GQL-OP read_back]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: true) { totalCount } }
[GQL-EXEC read_back]
[GQL-OP verify_all]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount } }
[GQL-EXEC verify_all]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=seed_unread] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=probe_before] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=probe_before] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=mark_all_read] errors[] empty
[DATA label=mark_all_read] data.markAllPushMessagesRead = true
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.pushMessages.totalCount = 0
[ERRORS label=verify_all] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=verify_all] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=read_back] unreadOnly=true returns totalCount=0 after markAllPushMessagesRead
[ROUNDTRIP label=verify_all] full list (unreadOnly=false) still returns all messages — none deleted
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on mark_all_read, markAllPushMessagesRead returns false, unreadOnly=true still returns items after bulk mark, messages deleted instead of marked read

Steps:

Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-push015", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-push015-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_msg]
--- READ STATE (ORG_USER xAPI) ---

[GQL-OP seed_read]

  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount } }

  mutation { markAllPushMessagesUnread }

[GQL-OP read_back]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: true) { totalCount } }
[GQL-EXEC read_back]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=seed_read] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=probe_before] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=probe_before] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=mark_all_unread] errors[] empty

Title: xAPI GraphQL — Clear All Push Messages
Preconditions: Self-seeds 1 Sent push to EUR_USER (isolated agent-pool account) then clears its inbox via clearAllPushMessages. Uses EUR_USER (not ORG_USER) so the destructive clear does not disturb the ORG_USER fixtures the other cases self-seed.
Steps:
--- DISCOVER recipient member id ---
[AUTH role=EUR_USER]
[GQL-OP me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC me]
[GQL-CAPTURE me.data.me.id → RCPT_MEMBER_ID]
--- SEED (ADMIN) targeting recipient member ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_msg]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-push016", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-push016-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{RCPT_MEMBER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_msg]
--- CLEAR (EUR_USER xAPI) ---
[AUTH role=EUR_USER]
[GQL-OP probe_before]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC probe_before]
[GQL-OP clear_all]
  mutation { clearAllPushMessages }
[GQL-EXEC clear_all]
[GQL-OP read_back]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount } }
[GQL-EXEC read_back]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=me] errors[] empty
[DATA label=me] data.me.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=seed_msg] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=probe_before] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=probe_before] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=clear_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=clear_all] data.clearAllPushMessages = true
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.pushMessages.totalCount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=read_back] totalCount=0 after clearAllPushMessages — all messages removed for this user
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on clear_all, clearAllPushMessages returns false, messages still returned after clear, totalCount unchanged after mutation

Title: Authorization Boundary — Storefront Customer Token Cannot Create Push Messages via Admin API
Preconditions: Storefront customer token (ORG_USER, storeId={{STORE_ID}}) must NOT be authorized to create push messages via the module admin endpoint POST /api/push-message — expect HTTP 403 (authenticated but lacking the module permission). NOTE: /api/platform/pushnotifications is the Platform self-notification feed ([Authorize] = any principal) and correctly returns 200 — it is NOT an authz boundary.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[REST-OP platform_push]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-authz-probe", "shortMessage": "authz probe", "status": "Draft"}
[REST-EXEC platform_push]
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] confirm no notification created by the failed call — admin Push Messages list unchanged
[CONSOLE] no JS errors from REST call
Failure_Signals: HTTP 200/201 from /api/push-message using storefront token (real authorization gap — escalate), HTTP 404/405 (wrong endpoint or method, not an authz signal), message actually created despite 403 status

Title: E2E Cross-Layer — Admin Sends Targeted Push; Recipient Receives and Reads via xAPI
Preconditions: Admin creates a Sent push directly (status:Sent in POST body — there is no /send subendpoint) targeting ORG_USER member; ORG_USER reads it via xAPI and marks it read. ASYNC-DELIVERY: per-recipient inbox projection is asynchronous — a just-created Sent message is NOT guaranteed in the recipient xAPI inbox synchronously (verified 2026-06-09: probe_inbox returns null immediately after create). RUNNER-MANUAL — re-query the inbox after a short delay / poll until the message appears before mark_read.
Steps:
--- ADMIN ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP create_msg]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-e2e-delivery", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-e2e-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC create_msg]
[REST-CAPTURE create_msg.body.id → PUSH_MSG_ID]
--- STOREFRONT (xAPI) ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP probe_inbox]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount items { id shortMessage isRead } } }
[GQL-EXEC probe_inbox]
[GQL-CAPTURE probe_inbox.data.pushMessages.items[?shortMessage=AGENT-TEST-e2e-body].id → RECEIVED_ID]
[GQL-OP mark_read]
  mutation MarkRead($command: InputMarkPushMessageReadType!) {
    markPushMessageRead(command: $command)
  }
[GQL-VARS mark_read] {"command": {"messageId": "{{RECEIVED_ID}}"}}
[GQL-EXEC mark_read]
[GQL-OP verify_read]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { items { id shortMessage isRead } } }
[GQL-EXEC verify_read]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_msg] HTTP 200
[DATA label=create_msg] body.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=probe_inbox] errors[] empty
[DATA label=probe_inbox] data.pushMessages.items[?shortMessage=AGENT-TEST-e2e-body].id is non-null
[ERRORS label=mark_read] errors[] empty
[DATA label=mark_read] data.markPushMessageRead = true
[ERRORS label=verify_read] errors[] empty
[DATA label=verify_read] data.pushMessages.items[?id={{RECEIVED_ID}}].isRead = true
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] POST /api/push-message/search with statuses:[Sent] confirms message status=Sent
[ROUNDTRIP label=verify_read] isRead=true confirmed for the delivered message
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: create_msg returns 4xx/5xx, PUSH_MSG_ID null, probe_inbox cannot find message with AGENT-TEST-e2e-body shortMessage, mark_read errors[] non-empty, isRead still false in verify_read
Cleanup: none — Sent message is not deletable (AGENT-TEST-prefixed; leave in system)

Title: xAPI GraphQL — pushMessages Query Filters (unreadOnly / keyword / sort / cursor paging)
Preconditions: Self-seeds 2 Sent AGENT-TEST pushes to ORG_USER so keyword/sort/paging have at least 2 messages and a known keyword to match; store-user token requires storeId. ASYNC-DELIVERY: the keyword/count assertions over the just-seeded messages are delivery-timing-dependent (verified 2026-06-09: keyword_filter totalCount=0 immediately after seed — per-recipient delivery is async). RUNNER-MANUAL — poll inbox until both seeds appear before the keyword/sort/paging block. Structural filters (unreadOnly / sort / cursor-paging) over the pre-existing inbox are synchronous and pass.
Steps:
--- SEED (ADMIN) two messages ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_a]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-filter-a", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-filter-a-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_a]
[REST-OP seed_b]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-filter-b", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-filter-b-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-02T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_b]
--- FILTERS (ORG_USER xAPI) ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP force_unread]
  mutation { markAllPushMessagesUnread }
[GQL-EXEC force_unread]
[GQL-OP unread_filter]
  query GetUnread { pushMessages(first: 20, unreadOnly: true) { totalCount items { id isRead } } }
[GQL-EXEC unread_filter]
[GQL-OP keyword_filter]
  query GetByKeyword($keyword: String) { pushMessages(first: 20, keyword: $keyword) { totalCount items { id shortMessage } } }
[GQL-VARS keyword_filter] {"keyword": "AGENT-TEST-filter"}
[GQL-EXEC keyword_filter]
[GQL-OP sort_desc]
  query GetSorted($sort: String) { pushMessages(first: 20, sort: $sort) { items { id createdDate } } }
[GQL-VARS sort_desc] {"sort": "createdDate:desc"}
[GQL-EXEC sort_desc]
[GQL-CAPTURE sort_desc.data.pushMessages.items.0.id → FIRST_ID]
[GQL-OP page_one]
  query Page1 { pushMessages(first: 1) { items { id } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }
[GQL-EXEC page_one]
[GQL-CAPTURE page_one.data.pushMessages.pageInfo.endCursor → PAGE_CURSOR]
[GQL-CAPTURE page_one.data.pushMessages.items.0.id → PAGE1_ID]
[GQL-OP page_two]
  query Page2($after: String) { pushMessages(first: 1, after: $after) { items { id } } }
[GQL-VARS page_two] {"after": "{{PAGE_CURSOR}}"}
[GQL-EXEC page_two]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=force_unread] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=unread_filter] errors[] empty
[DATA label=unread_filter] data.pushMessages.items[?isRead=true].id is null
[ERRORS label=keyword_filter] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=keyword_filter] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 2
[DATA label=keyword_filter] data.pushMessages.items.0.shortMessage matches /AGENT-TEST-filter/i
[ERRORS label=sort_desc] errors[] empty
[DATA label=sort_desc] data.pushMessages.items.0.createdDate >= data.pushMessages.items.1.createdDate
[ERRORS label=page_one] errors[] empty
[DATA label=page_one] data.pushMessages.pageInfo.hasNextPage = true
[ERRORS label=page_two] errors[] empty
[DATA label=page_two] data.pushMessages.items.0.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=page_two] items on page 2 are different from items on page 1 (no duplicates)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on any filter op, unreadOnly=true returns read messages, keyword filter returns messages not matching keyword, page 2 cursor returns same items as page 1, HTTP 401
Cleanup: none — seeds are AGENT-TEST-prefixed and Sent (not deletable)

Title: E2E — trackNewRecipients Toggle: tracking flag flips without error and inbox count never decreases
Preconditions: Seeds a Sent tracked push to ORG_USER (member {{ORG_USER_ID}}), toggles trackNewRecipients on/off via PUT /api/push-message/{id}/tracking/{bool}, and confirms inbox count does not increase after tracking is disabled. storeId required for storefront token.
Steps:
--- ADMIN: seed a Sent tracked push and enable tracking ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_tracked]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-track", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-track-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}
[REST-EXEC seed_tracked]
[REST-CAPTURE seed_tracked.body.id → TRACKED_MSG_ID]
[REST-OP set_track_on]
PUT /api/push-message/{{TRACKED_MSG_ID}}/tracking/true
[REST-EXEC set_track_on]
--- STOREFRONT (xAPI) — inbox while tracking ON ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP inbox_on]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount items { id shortMessage } } }
[GQL-EXEC inbox_on]
--- ADMIN: disable tracking ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP set_track_off]
PUT /api/push-message/{{TRACKED_MSG_ID}}/tracking/false
[REST-EXEC set_track_off]
--- STOREFRONT (xAPI) — inbox while tracking OFF ---
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP inbox_off]
  query { pushMessages(first: 50, unreadOnly: false) { totalCount items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC inbox_off]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=seed_tracked] HTTP 200
[DATA label=seed_tracked] body.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=set_track_on] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=inbox_on] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=inbox_on] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=set_track_off] HTTP 200
[ERRORS label=inbox_off] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=inbox_off] data.pushMessages.totalCount >= 1
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=inbox_on] recipient sees the TRACKED_MSG_ID message in inbox when trackNewRecipients=true
[ROUNDTRIP label=inbox_off] totalCount after set_track_off does not increase
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: set_track_on returns 4xx/5xx, inbox empty despite seeded message, inbox_off shows additional messages added after tracking disabled, HTTP 401 for xAPI call (storeId missing)

Cross_Layer_Checks:

Failure_Signals: create_org_target returns 4xx (org field name wrong), create_group_target returns 4xx (group field name wrong), body.id null, Admin blade shows no recipient scope for targeting variants

Title: E2E — Scheduled Push Lifecycle: Future startDate then Auto-Delivery then Received by Recipient
Preconditions: PARTIAL-AUTO: full auto-delivery needs a multi-minute scheduler wait the browserless runner cannot poll. Authored to create+verify a scheduled Draft with a future startDate; the [WAIT] step + auto-delivery confirmation are runner-manual. Admin account accessible; ORG_USER storefront account (storeId=B2B-store); scheduler active.
Steps:
--- ADMIN ---
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP create_scheduled]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-scheduled", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-scheduled-body", "status": "Draft", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"], "startDate": "2099-01-01T00:00:00Z"}
[REST-EXEC create_scheduled]
[REST-CAPTURE create_scheduled.body.id → SCHED_ID]
[REST-OP verify_created]
GET /api/push-message/{{SCHED_ID}}
[REST-EXEC verify_created]
[WAIT] runner-manual: scheduler auto-delivers at startDate; poll GET /api/push-message/{{SCHED_ID}} until status=Sent, then re-query xAPI inbox as ORG_USER for AGENT-TEST-scheduled-body
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_scheduled] HTTP 200
[DATA label=create_scheduled] body.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=verify_created] HTTP 200
[DATA label=verify_created] body.startDate is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] After startDate passes, GET shows body.status=Sent and ORG_USER xAPI inbox contains AGENT-TEST-scheduled-body (runner-manual — scheduler wait)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: create_scheduled returns 4xx/5xx, SCHED_ID null, startDate not persisted, scheduler never flips status to Sent (escalate)

Title: Admin API Negative — Delete Sent Message Returns Error (HTTP 500 Known Defect)
Preconditions: A Sent push message exists (this case seeds one); DELETE of a Sent message is a known 500 defect — the module rejects modify/delete of Sent with HTTP 500 (should arguably be 4xx).
Steps:
[AUTH role=ADMIN]
[REST-OP seed_sent]
POST /api/push-message
Content-Type: application/json
Body: {"topic": "AGENT-TEST-neg-sent", "shortMessage": "AGENT-TEST-neg-sent-body", "status": "Sent", "startDate": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "memberIds": ["{{ORG_USER_ID}}"]}

Title: Admin Negative — Create Push Message with Zero Recipients Stays Draft
Preconditions: Admin account accessible; {{BACK_URL}} reachable. Creates a Draft with empty memberIds and verifies it persists as Draft (no implicit transition to Sent with zero delivery targets).

[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: message created with status Sent and zero recipients (business rule violation — Sent with no delivery targets), message deleted instead of staying Draft

Title: Admin — Localized Push Content Multi-Language (Verification Probe)
Preconditions: PROBE: module per-culture support for push messages is unconfirmed. cultureName is accepted on the record; this case probes whether create accepts per-culture variants without 5xx.
